texto: (And also like Satan, I'm a beautiful loser.)
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Benjamin Hale: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “(And also like Satan, I'm a beautiful loser.)” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, beautiful, nonfiction pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de nonfiction e satan.

seo.titleSeo: "(And also like Satan, I'm a beautiful loser.)" — Benjamin Hale | Metamensagem
seo.descriptionSeo: Metáfora atribuída a Benjamin Hale: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “(And also like Satan, I'm a beautiful los…

frase_original: (And also like Satan, I'm a beautiful loser.)

texto: ...we, and I mean humans, are meaning makers. We do not discover the meanings of mysterious things, we invent them. We make meanings because meaninglessness terrifies us above all things. More than snakes, even. More than falling, or the dark. We trick ourselves into seeing meanings in things, when in fact all we are doing is grafting our meanings onto the universe to comfort ourselves. We gild the chaos of the universe with our symbols. To admit that something is meaningless is just like falling backward into darkness." (p184)
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Benjamin Hale: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “...we, and I mean humans, are meaning makers. We do not discover the meanings of mysterious thing…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, fear, meaning pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reflexao-noturna e meaning.
